（体に力が入らない……！ 血を流し過ぎたか……！<br>このままでは、木から落ち:
(My body will not move... Did I lose too much blood...? At this rate, I
will fall from the tree and become the wolf's prey...)
（こんなところで、私は死ぬのか……。<br>無念だ……）: (Am I going to die in a place like this...? How frustrating...)
まさか……ハツネ、なのか……？<br>どうしてここに……！？: Could it be... Hatsune, is that you...? Why are you here...!?
説明は後でします！<br>しばしお待ちを！: I'll explain later! Please wait a moment!
さぁ、ケダモノ！ かかって来い！<br>あたしが相手してやる！: Now then, you beast! Bring it on! I'll be your opponent!
ハツネ……！<br>気をつけろ、その獣は危険だ！: Hatsune...! Be careful, that beast is dangerous!
――そう簡単に、あたしを捕まえられると思うなよ！: Don't think you can catch me that easily!
さあ……来い！<br>若殿に傷を負わせたこと、後悔させてやるっ！: Come on...! I'll make you regret injuring the Young Lord!
狼の牙と爪を、ハツネは紙一重で回避し続ける。:
Hatsune continued to dodge the wolf's fangs and claws by a hair's
breadth.
はん！ そんなもんかよっ！: Hah! Is that all you've got!
（あたしが攻撃を避け続けるもんだから、だんだんイラついてきてるな。<br>……そ:
(I keep dodging its attacks, so it's getting more and more annoyed...
Should be about time now.)
おっと！ どこを見てる！<br>あたしはこっち……: Whoa! What are you looking at! I'm over here...
狼の突進から身を躱そうとしたハツネだったが……<br>突然、体勢を崩した。:
Hatsune tried to evade the wolf's charge, but suddenly lost her
balance.
っ……！？<br>しまった、木の根に躓いた……！: Tch! Damn, I tripped on a tree root!
体勢を崩したハツネに、狼が飛び掛かる――！: The wolf lunged at the off-balance Hatsune!
いいか、まずはあの狼の注意を引け。<br>その間に、俺が罠をしかける。:
Listen, first draw that wolf's attention. While you do that, I'll set the
trap.
ああ。この辺りの木々は枝が柔らかくてよくしなる。<br>それに蔓も豊富だ。:
Yeah. The trees around here have branches that are soft and bendy.
Plus, there's plenty of vines.
枝と蔓、あとはありあわせの道具を組み合わせるだけで、<br>あの狼を捕らえる簡単:
With branches, vines, and whatever tools we have on hand, we should
be able to rig up a simple trap to catch that wolf.
ただ、あの狼は相当頭がいい。<br>コトノが不覚を取ったのも、風下から襲われたせ:
But that wolf is pretty clever. Kotono was caught off guard because
it attacked from downwind.
恐らく、真っ向から罠に誘い込もうとしても、<br>警戒されて失敗するだろう。:
Probably, if we try to lead it straight into a trap, it'll get suspicious
and it won't work.
ああ。訓練場で見たお前の動きなら、<br>狼の攻撃を避け続けることもできるだろう:
Yeah. With your movements at the training ground, you should be able
to keep dodging the wolf's attacks. What do you think?
それは……。<br>うん！ できると思う。: That's... Yeah, I think I can do it.
よし。それなら、徹底的にあいつを挑発して、翻弄してやれ。<br>そうして頭に血が:
Good. Thoroughly provoke and toy with him. Then, when he's
hot-headed...
罠にかけるんだな！: That's when we spring the trap!
そうだ。この作戦の成功はお前にかかってる。: That's right. The success of this operation depends on you.
――お前が若殿を助けるんだ。: —You're the one who will save the Young Lord.
ああ……もちろんだ！<br>やってやるさ！: Yeah... of course! I'll do it!
（頭に血をのぼらせて、まんまと飛びかかってきたな！）: (He got all worked up and walked right into it!)
ハツネへと向かって来た狼が、植物の蔓に足を絡めとられ、<br>宙へと吊り上げられ:
The wolf charging at Hatsune got its legs tangled in the vines and was
hoisted into the air—!
――いくら吠えたって、もう遅い。: —No matter how much you howl, it's too late.
よし、作戦成功だ！<br>流石だな、ハツネ。よくやっ――: Alright, plan successful! As expected, Hatsune. Well done—
うわっ！？<br>ちょっ、お前、急に何を抱き着いて……: Whoa! Hey, what's with the sudden hug...?
すごいなっ、お前！<br>コトノが不覚をとった相手を倒しちゃったぞ！:
That's amazing, you! You took down the one that even Kotono messed
up against!
分かった、分かったから。<br>落ち着けって。: I get it, I get it. Just calm down, all right?
あははっ！<br>あたし、お前とならどんな敵にも勝てる気がするぞ！: Ahaha! I feel like I can beat any enemy with you!
若殿！ ご無事ですか！？<br>早く傷の手当てを……: Young Lord! Are you alright? We need to treat your wounds quickly...
ああ、止血は済ませてある。<br>助けられてしまったな、ハツネ。それから、そちら:
Ah, I've already stopped the bleeding. I'm in your debt, Hatsune. And
you there...
……もしや貴殿は、前線基地の司令官殿ではありませんか？: ...By any chance, are you the Lord Commander of the Frontline Base?
そう言えば、そんなふうに呼ばれてたな。<br>しれーかんっていうのは、どういう役:
Come to think of it, they did call you that. What kind of position is
'Commaander'?
ハツネ、知らないのか……？<br>前線基地の全権を任されたお方だぞ。:
Hatsune, you didn't know...? He's the one entrusted with full
authority over the Frontline Base.
え！？ そ、そうなのですか！？<br>あたしってば、知らずに無礼な態度をとってた: Eh?! R-really! I think I've been acting rude without knowing it...
構わないさ。<br>今更態度を変えられたって、違和感あるしな。: I don't mind. It'd feel strange if you changed your tune now.
そ、そうか？ へへっ、そんな大層な身分なのに協力してくれてたなんて、<br>いい:
O-oh, really? Heh heh, even though you're such a big shot, you helped
us. You're a good guy, Commander!
おかげで命を救われました。<br>なんと感謝すればいいか……: Thanks to you, my life has been saved. How can I ever repay you...
気にするな。結果的に危険なモンスターを討伐できたし、<br>人的被害も抑えられた:
Don't worry about it. We took out a dangerous monster and kept
casualties to a minimum. All's well that ends well.
なんと懐の広いお方だ……。<br>それに比べて、私はまだまだですね……:
What a magnanimous person... Compared to you, I still have much to
learn.
……これ、途中で拾ってきました。<br>お返しします。: ... I picked this up on the way. Here, I'm returning it to you.
父上からいただいた短刀……: The short sword my father gave me...
ホウライに帰りましょう、若殿。<br>領主さまも、若殿の帰りを待っておいでです。:
Let's return to Hourai, Young Lord.
The Lord is waiting for your return.
……ハツネ。<br>今の私に、この短刀を手にする資格があるのだろうか。:
Hatsune... Does someone like me even deserve to hold this short
sword?
勿論でございます。<br>若殿は次期頭首となられるお方……:
Of course.
You are the one who will become the next head of the clan...
前線基地でコトノと出会い、稽古をつけてもらい、強くなったつもりでいた。<br>だ:
I met Kotono at the Frontline Base and trained with her, thinking I
had grown stronger. But this pathetic state... I cannot face my father.
若殿……何を……: Young Lord... what are you saying...
……すまぬ、ハツネ。やはり私は、まだホウライには戻れぬ。<br>今しばらく前線基:
I apologize, Hatsune. I still cannot return to Hourai.
I wish to
remain at the Frontline Base a while longer and continue my training.
……分かりました。それでは、このハツネ！<br>前線基地でもお供させていただきま:
I understand.
Then I, Hatsune, will accompany you to the Frontline Base as well!
そうか……すまぬな、ハツネ。<br>お前がいれば私も心強い。:
I see... I apologize, Hatsune.
With you here, I feel reassured.
若殿の身に危険が及ばぬよう、しっかりとお護りいたします！<br>まずは前線基地に:
I will protect you from any danger!
First, let's return to the Frontline Base and treat your wounds.
その後、<user>たちは前線基地へと無事帰還した。: After that, <user> and the others returned safely to the Frontline Base.
良かったな。あの若者、出血は酷かったが命に別状はないそうだ。<br>一週間もすれ:
Good to hear. That young man lost a lot of blood, but I hear his life
isn't in danger.
Seems like he'll be able to move in about a week.
あたし１人じゃ、若殿を救うことはきっとできなかった……。<br>司令官にはでっか:
I couldn't have saved the Young Lord on my own...
I owe you a huge debt, Commander.
気にするなって。<br>俺だって、お前がいなければ貴重な人材を失うところだったん:
Don't worry about it.
If you weren't there, I would have lost a valuable person.
だから、借りだなんて思わなくていい。: So don't think of it as a debt.
そうはいくか！<br>受けた恩は返すのがサムライだ！:
No way!
A samurai repays a debt of gratitude!
いらないって言われても、ぜったい返すからな！:
I don't care if you say you don't need it, I'm definitely paying you
back!
分かった分かった。<br>頑固なやつだな、お前は。: Alright, alright. You're a stubborn one, aren't you?
それでさ、司令官。<br>あたしも若殿と一緒に前線基地に残ろうと思うんだけどさ…:
So, Commander, I'm thinking of staying at the Frontline Base with the
young master too, but...
その……迷惑じゃなければ、また司令官の仕事を手伝わせてほしいんだ。: Um... if it's no trouble, could I help you with your work again?
借りを返したいっていうのもあるけど、<br>ここにいるだけで、あたしも、もっとも:
I want to repay my debt, but also, just being here makes me feel like I
can get even stronger!
きっと、司令官の役にも立って見せるからさ！<br>どうかな？: I'll definitely prove useful to you, Commander! What do you think?
なんだ、改まって言うから何かと思えば、そんなことか。: What, you get all serious and that's all it is?
もちろん、断る理由はないな。<br>お前がいてくれれば、前線基地にとっても心強い:
Of course, there's no reason to refuse. Having you here is reassuring
for the Frontline Base.
ほ、ほんとか！？<br>えへへっ、司令官からそこまで言われちゃ仕方ないなぁ。: R-really!? Ehehe, if you say so, I guess I've got no choice.
司令官が大変な時は、あたしが助太刀してやるよ！<br>だから……: When you're in trouble, I'll come help you out! So...
これからもよろしくな、司令官！: Let's keep working together from now on, Commander!
